title: ChangeGameTitle
description: This is a Fabric mod with a modified title of the game, written by an author from China. How to use: Create a file called title.json in the root directory of the game, and modify the value of title in it. And this mod comes with some APIs to get informatio
body:
en_US
---
This is a Fabric mod with a modified title of the game, written by an author from China. How to use: Create a file called title.json in the root directory of the game, Write the following json content,,and modify the value of title in it. And this mod comes with some APIs to get informatio

title.json
{
    "title": "your title"
}

The Title Api:
${Game_Time}    -- get Game Time
${Minecraft_Version} -- get Minecraft Version
${Player_Name} -- get Player Name
${Game_Fps} -- get Game Fps
---

zh_CN
---
这是一个修改了游戏标题的Fabric模组，由一位来自中国的作者编写。使用方法：在游戏的根目录中创建一个名为title.json的文件，写入下面的json内容，并修改其中title的值。这个模组带有一些 API 来获取信息

title.json
{
    “title”：“您的标题”
}

标题 API：
${Game_Time} -- 获取游戏时间
${Minecraft_Version} -- 获取 Minecraft 版本
${Player_Name} -- 获取玩家名称
${Game_Fps} -- 获取游戏帧数
---

This is My Github: https://www.github.com/Frish2021-open
这是我的Gitee: https://www.gitee.com/Frish2021
